creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

During the testing, the build fails due to orphaned directory:

http://pd.valinor.palantiri.org/data/84amd64-default/2015-03-13_11h17m48s/logs/errors/doublecmd-0.6.0.log

If you can send a patch that fixes that problem, I can test it and commit if if it will be ok.

Kind regards,
Bartek Rutkowski
